changeSet.author: danylo
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR ALTER TRIGGER trg_users_participations_counter ON participations AFTER INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
UPDATE u SET active_participations_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM participations p WHERE p.user_id = u.id AND p.is_active = 1 ) FROM users u WHERE u.id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM inserted WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT user_id FROM deleted WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL ); END;

changeSet.author: danylo
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR ALTER TRIGGER trg_context_roles_members_counter ON participations AFTER INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
UPDATE cr SET active_members_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM participations p WHERE p.context_role_id = cr.id AND p.is_active = 1 ) FROM context_roles cr WHERE cr.id IN ( SELECT context_role_id FROM inserted WHERE context_role_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT context_role_id FROM deleted WHERE context_role_id IS NOT NULL ); END;
